summary: Verified 3 new admin features (Activity Log, Auto Scheduler, Bulk Actions + CSV Export). Added 11 new backend pytest tests in test_admin_v2.py — all 11 PASS. Existing 25 tests still PASS (total 36/36). Playwright verified admin login, 7 tabs, activity-table renders, scheduler-run-now toast, users/payments bulk action buttons appear on selection, users/payments export-csv buttons present.

issues: Multiple simultaneous toasts overlap horizontally (scheduler + reminder toasts render on top of each other). Consider vertical stacking or Sonner stack layout.

action_items: (Optional) Fix toast stacking on admin dashboard when multiple toasts fire in quick succession.
(Carry-over from iter1) SendGrid/Twilio/Xendit still MOCKED — supply keys to enable real sends.
critical_code_review_comments: _run_due_reminders compares ISO strings with $lte for due_date — works because ISO 8601 UTC strings sort lexically, but future timezone drift or naive datetimes stored could break this. Consider storing due_date as native BSON date.
log_admin_action swallows all exceptions silently — good for resilience but a broken index/schema will go unnoticed; consider raising in dev.
_send_reminder_for_payment still uses sync SendGrid/Twilio clients inside async handler; will block event loop under real load once keys are added (also flagged in iter1).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_v2.py (new — 11 tests covering logs, bulk delete, bulk remind, CSV exports, scheduler-run-now, scheduler dedupe within 24h)
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates TEST_ prefixed users, timestamped v2 user, netflix subscription and payments due in 2 days. Not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run backend tests with `pytest -o addopts='' backend/tests/` to avoid xdist race on session fixtures. All new admin/v2 endpoints functional including duplicate-send prevention (24h window) verified end-to-end.
